reasoning: Initial observation suggests that the total resistance is the sum of R1 and R2. To confirm this, I will increase R1.
Increasing R1 did not change the total resistance, suggesting that the resistors are in series. I will now decrease R1 to confirm the series connection.

The total resistance remains unchanged when R1 is decreased, confirming that the resistors are in series. Increasing or decreasing either resistor by itself does not change the total resistance, which supports the series configuration. The total resistance is consistently the sum of R1 and R2.
